parsed_review.summary: CP00-346 (RP11 Time Expense Disbursement, risk C, 150 units, range RP11.P02.M09.S19-RP11.P04.M03.S05) is a sound descriptor-only pack. The pack-level production_ready claim is conservatively and honestly FALSE: manifest.json sets production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer="descriptor", status="implemented_pending_review", and command-evidence.json sets production_ready=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false with all listed implementation/plan/repo validation commands at exit_code 0. Independent read-only inspection of service.js, validators.js, registry.js, the contract, the test, and the validate script confirms the implementation is genuinely descriptor-only with comprehensive no-write/no-real-data/no-leak attestations and no DB, network, object storage, UI/API/test/command runtime, or Hermes runtime receipts. validateTimeExpenseCoreCp346Coverage performs a real cross-check of the live plan pack against deliverable, phase, micro-phase, micro-title, and per-section row counts; the 17 required sections sum to exactly 150 rows, and the prompt's deliverable_distribution and micro_title_distribution match registry.js exactly. The live closeout-pack-plan (live_state at CP00-345, next unit RP11.P02.M09.S19, next pack CP00-347) confirms CP00-346 is the correct next pack with no plan drift, and the contract/validate-script deep-equality checks bind the descriptor, requirements, and no_write_attestation. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read_only with tools [Read,Grep,Glob], claude_is_final_approver=false, enterprise trust not claimed from local validation (deferred to human approval outside the receipt), and Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor evidence packets (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false). CP178+ review-hardening evidence is valid: auth preflight passed with well-formed JSON, prompt is 2480B (<25600) with no embedded full diff/source, summary-only review correctly prohibited for risk C, the forbidden_review_evidence blocker list is complete, no forbidden tools are present, no active untracked implementation files were omitted, and no stale/invalid prior-attempt artifacts exist (invalid_attempts_preserved=[]). No P0/P1/P2 findings. One P3 process note: the downstream post-review evidence chain (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) is not yet on disk, which is expected at the read_only_claude_run step and must be generated and re-validated before the closeout commit. As a scope caveat, command results were verified via command-evidence.json and the well-formed baseline/readiness/validation reports rather than executed directly (read-only reviewer; no Bash). Claude is an independent reviewer, not the final approver; human final approval remains required for any enterprise trust claim.

findings.title: Post-review evidence chain not yet materialized (expected at this stage)
findings.details: Each unit's evidence_refs in the manifest (e.g., claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) and the review_hardening block in command-evidence.json (raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) reference files that are not yet present on disk. This is the expected state at the read_only_claude_run step of the hardened review sequence (baseline_capture -> readiness_validation -> read_only_claude_run_with_raw_capture -> receipt_normalization -> receipt_validation -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation -> commit); these artifacts are produced downstream from this review. It is not a code or contract defect and does not block this review step.
findings.recommendation: Before the closeout commit, ensure the post-review gated commands (closeout-pack:review:run/normalize/receipt:validate, closeout-pack:validate, git diff --check --cached) are executed and pass after claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, and review-receipt.json are generated, so the committed manifest's evidence_refs resolve and the receipt chain validates.
